headline: Assessing Merck (MRK) Valuation After Strong Recent Share Price Momentum
summary: Merck stock performance snapshot Merck (MRK) has drawn fresh attention after recent trading left the shares at a last close of US$123.18, with the stock showing positive total returns over the past year and the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Merck. For context, Merck’s recent 1 month share price return of 5.18% and 3 month share price return of 10.98% sit alongside a 1 year total shareholder return of 55.85%, suggesting momentum has been building over both shorter and longer...
